message:
test(B10): wave 74 — derive-trait coverage for resource, crdt, eprocess, budget

18 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Eq/Default traits:
- PoolStats, PoolExhausted, ResourceKind, ResourceLimits, ResourceUsage,
  ResourceRequest, ResourceExhausted
- CrdtObligationEntry, CrdtObligationLedger, LinearityViolation, LedgerSnapshot
- MonitorConfig, AlertState, MonitorSnapshot
- Budget (Clone/Copy), CurveError, MinPlusCurve, CurveBudget

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
